scripts.build: terser app.js -o app.js --compress --mangle && terser components/landing.js -o components/landing.js --compress --mangle && terser components/auth.js -o components/auth.js --compress --mangle && terser components/courses.js -o components/courses.js --compress --mangle && terser components/dashboards.js -o components/dashboards.js --compress --mangle && terser components/news.js -o components/news.js --compress --mangle && terser components/shop.js -o components/shop.js --compress --mangle && terser components/whiteboard.js -o components/whiteboard.js --compress --mangle
